text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm working in my office one day, when...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Kawakami Princess says, it's the most
festive time of the year. To mark the occassion,
I've given her the day off so that she can relax
and enjoy herself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I saaaid happy holidays! ♪
choice_data_list:
Yup. Happy holidays. Be sure to enjoy your day
off, okay?

Yup. Happy holidays. Be sure to enjoy your day
off, okay?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Aren't you going to celebrate the holidays today as well?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? You mean only I have the day off?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-what's that all about?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Saying this, she bursts out of my office.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hm, hm, hmmm. ♪
Hm, hm, hmmm. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess hums a tune as she puts up
festive decorations around my office.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer, no matter how hungry you get,
make sure you don't touch that pizza. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Your holiday season begins once you've finished
all your work!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Make sure to work up a big appetite! I'll
even get us a roast chicken!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I... might not have enough money...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give a teary-eyed Kawakami Princess a little
holiday cheer in the form of some allowance.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hm, hm, hmmm.
Hm, hm, hmmm.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Nothing at all. I thought that it might help you
concentrate better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list: You can go ahead and start eating without me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...I want to eat together.
choice_data_list: Gotcha. I'll try to finish this up quickly.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I finish writing my last report, I send out one
final email and...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Are you done?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ahh!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Then let's hurry and eat! We still have time left
before the day is done!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, don't worry about it! A quick zap in the
microwave and it'll be piping hot again!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now, let's get this party started! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I spend a delightfully festive evening with
Kawakami Princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Then let's head out right away!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry—a quick zap in the microwave and it
will be piping hot again! C'mon, let's go, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Kawakami Princess takes my hand and
leads me outside...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Schwoop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And before I know it, I find myself facing the sky.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, isn't it faster being carried in a princess's
arms? Hold on tight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel the wind rush across my face as Kawakami
Princess starts to pick up speed.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! ♪ Lifting you is easy compared to the
barbell I normally use!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Kawakami Princess carries me to the top
of a hill.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Look, Trainer! Isn't the view at night simply
beautiful?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
When I first discovered this place, I just knew it
was the perfect spot to kick off the festivities!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehe, indeed. ♪ I think so, too... Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Thank you for all the work you do.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. You're very welcome.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back to my office, we buy a Princess
Fighter cake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might have been a late start, but I enjoy a nice,
festive evening with Kawakami Princess.
